description_long: This airplane features a unique, almost steampunk-inspired design with a broad, flat wing structure supported by multiple cables and struts. The fuselage is robust and metallic, with exposed mechanical components and two large, cylindrical engines mounted on either side. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, all fixed and reinforced with visible struts. The tail section is equipped with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both angular and metallic. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a canopy and surrounded by intricate framework. The overall color palette is dominated by muted greens, grays, and metallic tones, giving the airplane a rugged, industrial appearance.
description: A rugged, metallic airplane with a broad, cable-supported wing, exposed engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit, finished in muted green and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat wing, dual engines, and the cable-supported structure with the cockpit canopy visible at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the angular tail, and the fixed landing gear beneath the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizer, and the robust landing gear arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the exposed engine details, cable supports, and the cockpit's forward placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with straight, broad wings supported by multiple external cables and struts; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin exposed piston engines mounted on either side of the fuselage, forward of the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer; angular and metallic in appearance.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all reinforced with visible struts.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat, integrated into the front of the fuselage.
